title: Mid-Level Radiologist at Dr Lal PathLabs International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Radiologist at Dr Lal PathLabs International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Radiologist looking for your next big career move? Dr Lal PathLabs International Enterprises in Ludhiana offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Dr Lal PathLabs International Enterprises:
Dr Lal PathLabs International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dr Lal PathLabs International Enterprises!
